stemHtml: Which factors should a pilot check before landing on a contaminated runway?

options.a: Pilot reported braking action, approach type, estimated surface friction
options.b: Type and depth of contaminant, estimated surface friction, and pilot reported braking action
options.c: Estimated time on the runway, type and depth of contaminant, approach type
options.d: Estimated autobrake capability, estimated time on the runway, estimated surface friction
